programme.title: Sin Island
programme.desc: After his wife seems to lose interest in him, a photographer travels to an exotic island where he begins a dangerous affair with a recently separated woman.

programme.title: Maria, Leonora, Teresa
programme.desc: Faith, Julio, and Stella are given life-sized dolls to cope with a tragedy, but the toys are controlled by a sinister master.

programme.title: I Think I'm in Love
programme.desc: Jonas, a womanizer, has a string of affairs with different young women. Tired of his lifestyle, his brother challenges him to be with a woman for three months without having any sexual contact.

programme.title: Kasunduan
programme.desc: August, an orphan, sheds off his compassionate and idealistic self once he enters the world of organized crime and becomes a criminal.

programme.title: #WalangForever
programme.desc: Mia, a celebrated scriptwriter, reaches a point in life where she does not believe in lasting love. However, her life turns upside down after her ex-boyfriend comes back to her.

programme.title: Mano Po 5: Gua Ai Di
programme.desc: A freewheeling veterinarian (Richard Gutierrez) tries to follow Chinese customs while wooing a tradition-minded Chinese woman (Angel Locsin).

programme.title: Sugatang Puso
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are forced to take in his difficult son from his previous marriage. When the son and the wife's son get involved in a car accident, life drastically changes.

programme.title: Pido Dida: Sabay Tayo
programme.desc: Pido and Dida grow up together in an orphanage and share a great bond with each other. Things change when their parents find them and they get separated.

programme.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
programme.desc: Two strangers accidentally get married.

programme.title: Rematado
programme.desc: A disgraced cop tries to make amends with his angry wife by getting her pawned wedding ring back, but after robbers steal the ring from the pawn shop, he is forced to track them down to save his marriage.

programme.title: Guwapings Dos
programme.desc: Three friends embark on an adventure together to try to overcome their personal demons in order to survive.

programme.title: Tar-San
programme.desc: Tar and San are formally declared as future chiefs of the Agatao tribe. However, they find an enemy in Sabukot, who has his eyes on the throne himself.

programme.title: Crazy Beautiful You
programme.desc: Jackie is taken on a medical mission to calm her rebellious spirit. When she arrives she meets Kiko, and the two discover something crazy and beautiful together.

programme.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
programme.desc: Two strangers accidentally get married.

programme.title: Home Along da Riles 2
programme.desc: Kevin, who struggles to raise his four children due to financial problems, suddenly becomes a millionaire. Then, he moves into a bigger house, which leads to hilarious situations.

programme.title: Ako ang Lalagot sa Hininga mo

programme.desc: Sonny, a promising young politician, works with Billie, a hotshot image consultant, to improve his senate campaign and soon falls in love with her.

programme.title: Ang Tanging Pamilya
programme.desc: A young woman accepts a marriage proposal from her long-distance boyfriend but has no idea their families will soon be at war.

programme.title: To Mama With Love
programme.desc: When a father abandons his family to move to the United States, the daughters take it upon themselves to care for their mother, especially after her health begins to deteriorate.

programme.title: Tunay Na Tunay: Gets Mo? Gets Ko!
programme.desc: Police officer Nick goes undercover as a cook and meets Tin Tin, a waitress. However, things take a turn when he discovers an unexpected truth.

programme.desc: The first Filipino hero and the King of Mactan.

programme.desc: When Phil detects a meteor is hurtling towards the farm, the Bettermans and Croods must decide how to spend their last day on earth.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School

programme.title: Rupert Bear

programme.title: Rupert Bear

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe accidentally knocks Harper's soccer cleat off the balcony before the big game, the Dew Drops must venture into the city to retrieve the cleat. / When Dylan starts practicing magic tricks, Athena thinks his magic is real! But when the Dew Drops investigate his “magic hat,” they accidentally break it and must fix it before Dylan’s magic show for the neighborhood kids.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus is having his first sleepover and Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever. / When Athena’s magical jump rope gets sucked up by the family’s new robot vacuum, she loses confidence in her abilities, only to learn that her real abilities are already inside her.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Shark Bait
programme.desc: A group of friends on vacation steal a couple of jet skis for fun and race them out to sea, ending up in a head-on collision. They struggle to find a way home with a badly injured friend, while from the waters below predators lurk.

programme.title: La Brea S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole mysteriously opens up in Los Angeles, separating part of a family in an unexplainable primeval world, alongside a desperate group of strangers.

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 6
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Don't Forget the Lyrics S7 - EP 1
programme.desc: Contestants must attempt to sing through and fill in the missing lyrics to TEN of the biggest hit songs of all time! But when the music stops, the contestant must correctly provide the missing song lyrics. If a contestant can successfully make it through the first 9 songs without missing a SINGLE lyric, they'll have the chance to play a 10th and final song for a shot at ONE MILLION DOLLARS!
